title: FoxClear
description: FoxClear is a lightweight Fabric mod that automatically clears dropped items after a configurable interval.
body:
# **FoxClear**

FoxClear is a lightweight yet powerful Fabric mod/plugin that automatically removes dropped items from the ground after a configurable interval.
Keep your server clean, reduce lag, and provide a smooth experience for your players.

## ✨ Features
> 🕒 Automatic item removal after a customizable number of minutes (set in config/autoclearitems.properties). \
> 💬 Countdown warnings before cleaning: 30s – 10s – 5s. \
> 🌍 Multi-language support: messages automatically display in the player’s Minecraft language (English, Vietnamese, French, Spanish, Japanese, Korean, Russian, and more). \

## ⌨️ Admin command:
> /clearnow – Instantly removes all dropped items (requires OP level 2+). \
> 📜 Lightweight, fast, and easy to set up — no complicated dependencies.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e62bed37008957419e4429e7ad18fe5fd5d0ceb3.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13c40574f52a134d88931a012d2fd958b33dfb54_0.webp)
## ⚙️ Configuration
> After the first launch, a configuration file is created at:  \
> config/autoclearitems.properties

## Default content:
> clear-interval-minutes=15 \
> Change the value of clear-interval-minutes to adjust the cleanup interval (in minutes).

## 🌐 Supported Languages
> English (en_us), \
> Vietnamese (vi_vn), \
> …and more.

📦 Installation
> Download the .jar file of FoxClear. \
> Place it in the mods folder of your server or client. \
> Restart your Minecraft/Fabric server. \
> Requires Minecraft 1.20.1+ and a compatible Fabric Loader.

💡 Benefits
> Keeps your server clean and lag-free by removing excess dropped items. \
> Improves gameplay performance, especially for large or busy servers. \
> Simple configuration, multilingual support, and easy to extend.
